text.title: competitor-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for competitor-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Only analyzing direct competitors while ignoring indirect and future competitors.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Indirect competitors (substitutes, "do nothing") are the actual churn cause — they do not appear in "top 5 CRM alternatives" searches but account for most of the market's status quo.

failure-mode.description: Surface-level analysis (name + pricing only) without digging into reviews, pricing pages, and features.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feature gaps and quality gaps that create differentiation opportunities are invisible at surface level; they require review mining and hands-on product evaluation.

failure-mode.description: Copying competitor features rather than finding gaps to differentiate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feature parity is a race to the bottom; differentiation lives in the gaps the competitor chose not to fill.

failure-mode.description: One-time analysis without setting up ongoing monitoring.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A SWOT snapshot decays in 3-6 months; without a re-run cadence, decisions made from it become stale anchors.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated funding/ARR: agent invents plausible figures like "$12.3M Series A" without Crunchbase/PitchBook access.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard rule: if API key absent, write TBD and audit the output for any $N not in the source CSV before publishing.

failure-mode.description: SWOT tautology: agent writes "strong brand" because the company is famous, without a cited evidence URL.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reject any S/W cell whose evidence is the agent's prior knowledge rather than a fetched URL. One citation per cell is non-negotiable.

failure-mode.description: Context overflow on 10+ competitors: agent tries to pass raw scrapes into a single synthesis prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Do not pass raw scrapes into synthesis. SWOT each competitor to YAML first, then synthesize from the YAMLs only — this fits in context and produces cleaner output.

failure-mode.description: Strategic-group axis-shopping: agent picks axes post-hoc that maximise visual separation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin axes in the prompt before running (e.g., price vs. feature breadth with named exemplars for each pole). If data does not separate on pre-committed axes, that is the finding.

failure-mode.description: Recency bias: SWOT skews to last-90-days news, missing structural threats from the prior 3 years.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a 3-year retrospective scan ("structural threats since 2023") as a separate sub-task before synthesis.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated funding / ARR: without paid Crunchbase/PitchBook access the agent invents plausible figures.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard rule: "if API key absent, write TBD" and audit the output for any $N not in the source CSV.

failure-mode.description: SWOT tautology: agent writes "strong brand" because the brand is famous. Reject any S/W cell whose evidence is the agent's prior knowledge rather than a fetched URL.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: One citation per cell is non-negotiable.

failure-mode.description: Share-precision overconfidence: agent reports 23.4%. Force-round to 5% buckets in the prompt and reject any number with a decimal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Traffic + employees + reviews are correlated proxies, not independent measurements.

failure-mode.description: Strategic-group axis-shopping: agent picks axes post-hoc to make the picture clean.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin axes in the prompt; if the data does not separate, that is the finding.

failure-mode.description: Context overflow on 10+ competitors: do not pass raw scrapes into synthesis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SWOT each competitor to YAML first, then synthesise from the YAMLs only.

failure-mode.description: Recency bias: SWOT skews to last-90-days news.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a 3-year retrospective scan ("structural threats since 2023") as a separate sub-task.

failure-mode.description: Portfolio scorecard column drift: agent invents new columns each quarter to "improve" the scorecard.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Lock the schema and reject extra columns.

failure-mode.description: TAM-less share: agent reports "X has 30% market share" without naming the denominator.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every share % must be paired with a TAM source.

failure-mode.description: Human-in-the-loop checkpoints skipped: sign off on seed list + strategic-group axes before SWOT runs, review per-competitor SWOT YAMLs for cited-URL discipline, approve the share-bucket table and TAM denominator before it lands in board materials, accept or reject devil's-advocate findings before the executive summary.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each checkpoint catches a different class of failure that automated validation cannot surface.
